basic_details.job_title: SAIL RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1110 Trade, Diploma, Graduate Apprentices Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Rourkela Steel Plant (RSP), SAIL - Learning & Development Department
basic_details.post_name: Trade Apprentice (ITI), Diploma Apprentice, Graduate/Degree Apprentice
basic_details.short_information: This section summarizes the RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 for candidates who want the essential facts without reading the full notification. It covers the organization, total vacancies, application deadline, and mode of selection.

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27. Candidates only need to complete online registration on the applicable government portal before the last date.

age_limit.details: The RSP Apprentice age limit is minimum 18 years and maximum 28 years as on 31 August 2026 . Reservation and age relaxation will be applied as per the guidelines of the Government of Odisha.

qualification.details: Eligibility for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 requires candidates to have passed their qualifying exam as a regular candidate within the last five years, and to have no prior apprenticeship or one-year work experience. These conditions apply uniformly across Trade, Diploma, and Degree categories. | Only candidates who completed the qualifying examination as regular candidates are eligible. Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination in the last five years - 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026. Candidates who have appeared for the qualifying exam but whose results are not declared as on the last date of application are not eligible. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training at any establishment, or who have one year or more of job experience, are not eligible. | The RSP Apprentice age limit is minimum 18 years and maximum 28 years as on 31 August 2026. Reservation and age relaxation will be applied as per the guidelines of the Government of Odisha.

vacancy_details.Branch/Discipline: Combined Total (Diploma + Degree, Sections B & C)

discipline_wise_breakdown.branch_discipline: Combined Total (Diploma + Degree, Sections B & C)

category_wise_vacancy.Branch/Discipline: Combined Total (Diploma + Degree, Sections B & C)

salary_details.details: The RSP Apprentice stipend varies by category and, for engineering Diploma/Degree apprentices, is shared between RSP and the Basic Off-Roll Training Provider (BOPT) under DBT mode. | Stipend for Trade Apprentices is as per rates prescribed by MSDE, GoI. For Graduate/Technician (Diploma & Degree) Apprentices, 50% of the stipend is paid by RSP and 50% by BOPT under DBT mode, or as per prescribed MSDE rates. The training duration is one year. RSP will not provide accommodation or travel allowance to apprentices during training.

selection_process: Selection for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is merit-based rather than exam-based
calculated through a weighted formula applied during the walk-in shortlisting process.

Selection depends on vacancies available in each category and discipline. Candidates are shortlisted on academic merit through the walk-in process using a weighted formula: 30% weightage to Class X marks and 70% weightage to Degree/Diploma/ITI examination marks
as applicable. Marks must be mentioned in percentage; candidates with a CGPA must convert it to percentage as per their board/university norms
which will be verified during document verification. Engagement is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit as per the Apprentices Act
with the certificate issued by a Government doctor bearing a medical registration number.
how_to_apply: The RSP Apprentice apply online process differs slightly for ITI trade candidates and Diploma/Degree candidates, but both require completing portal registration before attending the walk-in. Applications will not be accepted without prior online registration and apply action on the respective portal.
Register as a candidate on apprenticeshipindia.org.
Log in to the home page of the apprenticeship portal as a candidate.
Go to Apprenticeship Opportunity and search by Establishment Name: SAIL ROURKELA STEEL PLANT.
Click apply for the prescribed trade against the vacancies appearing on the portal.
Register as a student on nats.education.gov.in.
Log in to the NATS portal home page as a candidate.
Go to Establishments Requests, then click Find Establishments.
Select Steel Authority of India Limited, Rourkela Steel Plant and apply in your passed-out branch of engineering.
After applying successfully on the portal, attend the walk-in as per the schedule for your trade/branch.
The last date to apply on the respective portal is 26 August 2026.
important_instructions: Fill correct details in all fields and upload scanned copies of all mandatory documents. Marks in the qualifying exam must be mentioned in percentage; CGPA holders must convert to percentage as per their board/university norms. Incomplete or erroneous applications submitted after the last date will be rejected, with no further communication entertained. Canvassing of any kind will disqualify the candidate. Vacancies displayed are indicative and may change at any time. RSP has no obligation to offer regular employment to apprentices during or after completion of training. Management reserves the right to cancel the selection process at any point and to fill or not fill any/all vacancies depending on candidate availability. The date of joining and venue for selected candidates will be intimated only through email.

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 Quick Overview
content_sections.text: This section summarizes the RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 for candidates who want the essential facts without reading the full notification. It covers the organization, total vacancies, application deadline, and mode of selection.

rows.details: Rourkela Steel Plant (RSP), SAIL - Learning & Development Department
Trade Apprentice (ITI), Diploma Apprentice, Graduate/Degree Apprentice
Central Recreation Room, Trainees' Hostel, Sector-5, Rourkela-769002, Sundargarh, Odisha
Online registration on apprenticeshipindia.org (Trade) or nats.education.gov.in (Diploma/Degree), followed by walk-in

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Important Dates 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates tracking the RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 timeline should note that this recruitment has two stages: online registration first, followed by a walk-in verification and selection process spread across several weeks in September 2026. All walk-in reporting is scheduled for 9:30 AM to 10:30 AM on each date.

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Vacancy 2026: Trade, Diploma & Degree-Wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The RSP Apprentice vacancy 2026 covers 46 trades and disciplines across three categories: ITI-based Trade Apprentices, Diploma holders, and Degree holders. The plant has clarified that displayed vacancies are indicative and may change during the selection process. Qualification for Trade Apprentice posts: ITI passed out in the respective trade from a Government-recognized institute. Qualification: Degree/Diploma in the respective discipline of Engineering from a Government-recognized institute/university.

tables.caption: B. Diploma & Degree (Graduate/Technician) Apprentice - Engineering Disciplines
C. Diploma & Degree Apprentice - General, Nursing & Paramedical Disciplines

rows.branch_discipline: Combined Total (Diploma + Degree, Sections B & C)

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 requires candidates to have passed their qualifying exam as a regular candidate within the last five years, and to have no prior apprenticeship or one-year work experience. These conditions apply uniformly across Trade, Diploma, and Degree categories. Only candidates who completed the qualifying examination as regular candidates are eligible. Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination in the last five years - 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 . Candidates who have appeared for the qualifying exam but whose results are not declared as on the last date of application are not eligible . Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training at any establishment, or who have one year or more of job experience , are not eligible . The RSP Apprentice age limit is minimum 18 years and maximum 28 years as on 31 August 2026 . Reservation and age relaxation will be applied as per the guidelines of the Government of Odisha.

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Application Fee
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention any application fee for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27. Candidates only need to complete online registration on the applicable government portal before the last date.

content_sections.heading: Registration Requirements Before Applying
content_sections.text: Before filling the online application, RSP Apprentice candidates must first create an account on the correct government portal based on their category, and ensure their contact and banking details meet DBT requirements. Trade Apprentices (ITI): Register at apprenticeshipindia.org . Graduate/Technician Apprentices (Diploma & Degree): Register on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at nats.education.gov.in . Candidates must have an active email ID and mobile number valid for at least the next one year, since all future communication happens only through email. The bank account must be DBT-enabled with KYC verified , and candidates must verify the correctness of all information before final submission. After successful online registration, candidates must take a printout of the filled application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 (Apply Online)
content_sections.text: The RSP Apprentice apply online process differs slightly for ITI trade candidates and Diploma/Degree candidates, but both require completing portal registration before attending the walk-in. Applications will not be accepted without prior online registration and apply action on the respective portal. Register as a candidate on apprenticeshipindia.org . Log in to the home page of the apprenticeship portal as a candidate. Go to Apprenticeship Opportunity and search by Establishment Name: SAIL ROURKELA STEEL PLANT . Click apply for the prescribed trade against the vacancies appearing on the portal. Register as a student on nats.education.gov.in . Log in to the NATS portal home page as a candidate. Go to Establishments Requests , then click Find Establishments . Select Steel Authority of India Limited, Rourkela Steel Plant and apply in your passed-out branch of engineering. After applying successfully on the portal, attend the walk-in as per the schedule for your trade/branch. The last date to apply on the respective portal is 26 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Walk-In Venue
content_sections.text: All shortlisted RSP Apprentice candidates must report in person at the same venue in Rourkela for document verification, regardless of trade or discipline, on their scheduled date. Venue: Central Recreation Room, Trainees' Hostel, Sector-5, Rourkela-769002, District Sundargarh, Odisha.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for RSP Apprentice Walk-In
content_sections.text: Candidates attending the RSP Apprentice walk-in must carry both original and self-attested documents for verification, along with a mandatory medical fitness certificate. Original Institution Leaving Certificate (retained by RSP until completion of training) Self-attested copy of Matriculation certificate for date-of-birth verification Self-attested copy of Provisional Pass Certificate Self-attested copy of SC/ST/OBC/PH Certificate (if applicable) Self-attested copy of Aadhaar Card/Bank Passbook (e-KYC validation mandatory) Medical Fitness Certificate from a Government hospital Apprentice Registration copy from the NAPS/NATS Portal

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is merit-based rather than exam-based, calculated through a weighted formula applied during the walk-in shortlisting process. Selection depends on vacancies available in each category and discipline. Candidates are shortlisted on academic merit through the walk-in process using a weighted formula: 30% weightage to Class X marks and 70% weightage to Degree/Diploma/ITI examination marks , as applicable. Marks must be mentioned in percentage ; candidates with a CGPA must convert it to percentage as per their board/university norms, which will be verified during document verification. Engagement is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit as per the Apprentices Act, 1961, with the certificate issued by a Government doctor bearing a medical registration number.

content_sections.heading: RSP Apprentice Stipend/Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The RSP Apprentice stipend varies by category and, for engineering Diploma/Degree apprentices, is shared between RSP and the Basic Off-Roll Training Provider (BOPT) under DBT mode. Stipend for Trade Apprentices is as per rates prescribed by MSDE, GoI. For Graduate/Technician (Diploma & Degree) Apprentices, 50% of the stipend is paid by RSP and 50% by BOPT under DBT mode , or as per prescribed MSDE rates. The training duration is one year . RSP will not provide accommodation or travel allowance to apprentices during training.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RSP Apprentice Applicants
content_sections.text: Fill correct details in all fields and upload scanned copies of all mandatory documents. Marks in the qualifying exam must be mentioned in percentage; CGPA holders must convert to percentage as per their board/university norms. Incomplete or erroneous applications submitted after the last date will be rejected, with no further communication entertained. Canvassing of any kind will disqualify the candidate. Vacancies displayed are indicative and may change at any time. RSP has no obligation to offer regular employment to apprentices during or after completion of training. Management reserves the right to cancel the selection process at any point and to fill or not fill any/all vacancies depending on candidate availability. The date of joining and venue for selected candidates will be intimated only through email.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying for RSP Apprentice 2026
content_sections.text: A number of otherwise-eligible candidates get rejected at the RSP apprentice walk-in due to procedural errors rather than genuine ineligibility. Knowing these common mistakes in advance can help candidates avoid last-minute disqualification. Registering on the wrong portal: ITI trade candidates must use apprenticeshipindia.org, while Diploma/Degree candidates must use the NATS portal - using the wrong one means the application won't reach RSP's vacancy listing at all. Skipping the online step before the walk-in: The notification is explicit that applications will not be accepted without prior online registration and apply action; simply showing up at the walk-in without portal registration is not sufficient. Reporting on the wrong date: Since the walk-in schedule is trade/branch-specific and spans nearly a month, candidates should double-check their exact discipline's reporting window rather than assuming a single common date. Carrying an unconverted CGPA: Candidates from CGPA-based boards must convert to percentage using their own board/university norms before filling the form, since RSP will verify this conversion at document verification. Missing e-KYC on Aadhaar-linked bank account: Since the bank account must be DBT-enabled with KYC verified, candidates should confirm this well before the last date rather than discovering an issue during document verification.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: There are 1110 total vacancies - 421 Trade (ITI) Apprentice posts, 414 Diploma Apprentice posts, and 275 Graduate/Degree Apprentice posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online on the respective portal (apprenticeshipindia.org for Trade, nats.education.gov.in for Diploma/Degree) is 26 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RSP Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is minimum 18 years and maximum 28 years as on 31 August 2026, with reservation-based relaxation as per Government of Odisha guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How do I apply online for RSP Apprentice Recruitment?
faq.answer: ITI trade candidates register and apply on apprenticeshipindia.org under Establishment Name "SAIL ROURKELA STEEL PLANT," while Diploma/Degree candidates register and apply on nats.education.gov.in by selecting "Steel Authority of India Limited, Rourkela Steel Plant."

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for RSP Apprentices?
faq.answer: Trade Apprentices receive ₹10,560/month (₹9,600/month for COPA and Welder trades), Graduate Apprentices receive ₹12,300/month, and Diploma Apprentices receive ₹10,900/month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a walk-in interview for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, after completing online registration, eligible candidates must attend a walk-in at the Central Recreation Room, Trainees' Hostel, Sector-5, Rourkela, on dates between 1 and 26 September 2026 depending on their trade or branch.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the RSP Apprentice walk-in?
faq.answer: Candidates need the original Institution Leaving Certificate, self-attested Matriculation certificate, Provisional Pass Certificate, SC/ST/OBC/PH certificate (if applicable), Aadhaar/passbook with e-KYC validation, a Government hospital medical fitness certificate, and NAPS/NATS registration proof.

faq.question: Q8. How is the RSP Apprentice selection made?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based, giving 30% weightage to Class X marks and 70% weightage to Degree/Diploma/ITI examination marks, subject to vacancy availability in each discipline.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for RSP Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Does RSP Apprentice training guarantee a permanent job at SAIL?
faq.answer: No, the notification states that RSP has no obligation to offer regular employment to apprentices during or after completion of the training period.
